channel.title: How to set up authentication
channel.description:
Hi.
Does Frontify support any out-of-the-box solutions for user authentication (signup, login, reset password)? If not, how have other Frontify users set this up?

item.title: How to set up authentication
item.dc:creator: alex.fernando.801
item.description:
Here’s a good start thread, at least for authentication JWT with Frontity , I used the code presented at the end of the thread, and worked for my authentication case, first installing the plugin JWT Auth – WordPress JSON Web Token Authentication – Plugin WordPress | WordPress.org España .

Also here’s is another thread that seems to have more info User signup/login with Frontity?

Hope it helps a little.

Read full topic

item.title: How to set up authentication
item.dc:creator: protoken
item.description:
Hi.

Does Frontify support any out-of-the-box solutions for user authentication (signup, login, reset password)? If not, how have other Frontify users set this up?

Read full topic
